mnemonics: Discrete is Different, Countable It Is
Continuous is Continuous, Integration It Needs
keyPoints: Probability mass function (PMF) for discrete random variables
Probability density function (PDF) for continuous random variables
Expected value (mean) of a random variable
Variances and standard deviations of random variables
Discrete vs continuous distributions (e.g., Bernoulli, Poisson, Normal)
Transformations of random variables (e.g., linear, non-linear)
